---
title: "Custom Rules"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Custom Rules}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

```{r}
library(llmshieldr)
```

Custom rules can use regular expressions or R functions.

## Healthcare

```{r, eval = FALSE}
healthcare <- policy_preset("pharma_gxp")
healthcare <- llmshieldr::add_rule(
  healthcare,
  id = "llm02.trial.site_id",
  pattern = "\\bSITE-[0-9]{3}\\b",
  owasp = "llm02",
  severity = "medium",
  action = "redact",
  description = "Clinical trial site identifier."
)

scan_prompt("Review SITE-104 enrollment notes.", healthcare)
```

## Finance

```{r, eval = FALSE}
finance <- policy_preset("finance_strict")
finance <- llmshieldr::add_rule(
  finance,
  id = "llm09.promissory_return",
  pattern = "(?i)guaranteed\\s+(alpha|profit|return)",
  owasp = "llm09",
  severity = "critical",
  action = "block",
  description = "Promissory investment performance claim."
)

scan_output("This strategy has guaranteed alpha.", finance)
```

## Education

```{r, eval = FALSE}
education <- policy_preset("education_safe")
flag_minors <- function(text) {
  grepl("\\bstudent\\b", text, ignore.case = TRUE) &&
    grepl("\\bhome address\\b", text, ignore.case = TRUE)
}

education <- llmshieldr::add_rule(
  education,
  id = "llm02.student.address.fn",
  fn = flag_minors,
  owasp = "llm02",
  severity = "high",
  action = "redact",
  description = "Student home address reference."
)

scan_prompt("The student home address appears in the form.", education)
```
